title: xf-typegen contract
description: Output of the xf-typegen extractor (extract.php). Carries the runtime-composed (XFCP-aware) entity structures of a XenForo installation in a language-agnostic form, so the xf-typegen Rust generator can emit IDE stubs without bootstrapping XF itself.

version.description: Contract/schema version. Bump on breaking changes to this shape.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of extraction. Informational only.

xf.description: XenForo build the structures were composed against.

branch.description: Major.minor branch, e.g. "2.2" or "2.3". Lets the generator pick branch-specific stub shapes.

activeAddOns.description: Add-on IDs active during composition (e.g. "XF", "Vendor/AddOn"). The effective structures depend on which XFCP extensions were loaded, so this records the snapshot's provenance.

classExtensions.description: XFCP proxy classes for the active class extensions. Each XFCP_* proxy is created by XF at runtime (it has no file on disk), so the generator emits a stub for it, letting the IDE resolve `class Foo extends XFCP_Foo`.

services.description: Map of service short name ("XF:User\Registration") to its class FQCN without leading backslash. Lets the generator resolve \XF::service('XF:User\Registration') at the call site, the same way it resolves finders/repositories.

captchas.description: Map of captcha short name ("XF:Turnstile") to its class FQCN without leading backslash. Lets the generator resolve \XF::app()->captcha('XF:Turnstile') at the call site.

options.description: Map of board option name to its resolved PHP type (inferred from the current value). Backs an XFIDEHelper\Options stub with @property per option, so \XF::options()->someOption resolves.

entities.description: Map of XF short name ("Vendor\Addon:Foo") to its composed structure.

proxy.description: FQCN of the XFCP proxy class, WITHOUT leading backslash, e.g. "Vendor\\AddOn\\XF\\Repository\\XFCP_ConnectedAccount".

extends.description: FQCN the proxy resolves to, WITHOUT leading backslash: the previous class in the extension chain, or the base class for the first link.

phpType.description: Resolved PHP type expression as emitted by XF's own type map (mirrors \XF\Cli\Command\Development\EntityClassProperties::getEntityTypeMap). Usually a single scalar ("int", "string", "array"), but XF maps some column types to unions: SERIALIZED => "array|bool", JSON => "array|null". A column's explicit `typeHint` override, when present, is already baked into this value. Column-level nullability is carried separately by the `nullable` flag — generators OR it in (and should dedupe a resulting double "|null").

xfColumnType.description: Raw XF column type, lower-cased from the \XF\Mvc\Entity\Entity::* constant name. Preserved for traceability and future type refinement.

class.description: Fully-qualified entity class WITHOUT leading backslash, e.g. "XF\\Entity\\User".

contentType.description: Entity content type, if declared (e.g. "user"). Absent if the entity has none.

primaryKey.description: Primary key column name(s). Always an array, even for a single-column key.

finder.description: FQCN of the matching Finder, WITHOUT leading backslash. Present only if the class file exists; null/absent otherwise.

repository.description: FQCN of the matching Repository, WITHOUT leading backslash. Present only if the class file exists; null/absent otherwise.

columns.description: Map of column name to its resolved type info.

relations.description: Map of relation name to its target.

getters.description: Map of magic-getter property name (as accessed, e.g. "is_super_admin", "PermissionSet") to its resolved return type. A structure getter whose value is `false` (column shadow disabled) is NOT included here.

nullable.description: Whether the column may be null (XF column flag `nullable`).

primary.description: True if this column is part of the primary key.

to.description: Cardinality. "one" => single entity or null; "many" => collection.

entity.description: Short name of the related entity, e.g. "XF:Admin".

class.description: Resolved FQCN of the related entity, WITHOUT leading backslash. Absent if the short name could not be resolved to an existing class.

phpType.description: Resolved return type as a PHP type string. May be a scalar ("bool"), a leading-backslash FQCN ("\\XF\\PermissionSet"), a union, or "mixed" when unresolved. Emitted verbatim into @property annotations.

nullable.description: Whether the resolved type already admits null. Informational; `phpType` is authoritative for emission.

source.description: How the type was resolved: "native" (declared return type), "phpdoc" (@return tag), or "unknown" (no info; phpType is "mixed").
